name: Ohishi Sangyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Ohishi Sangyo Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells industrial packaging materials in Japan. It offers pulp moulds that are used in livestock, agricultural, and industrial applications; and thermoplastic films, such as polystyrene and T-die embossed films, and polyethylene bags, as well as film coatings. The company also provides heavy duty bags, including multi-walled sack kraft bags, which are used for chemicals, plastics, flours, foods, animal feeds, and fertilizers, as well as form fill seals for use in plastics, such as poly-olefins; and corrugated boards that are used for industrial and agricultural applications. In addition, it offers cradle, a container for packing strawberries. The company was founded in 1947 and is based in Kitakyushu, Japan.
